name: Unusual Application Data Transfer Detected
description: An unusual data transfer pattern by a specific application has been detected, which could indicate data exfiltration or unauthorized resource usage.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the earliest event in the aggregation window.

parameters.name: SubjectUserName
parameters.description: The user account that initiated the data transfer.

parameters.name: ApplicationName
parameters.description: The name of the application involved in the data transfer.

parameters.name: SourceIp
parameters.description: The source IP address of the data transfer.

parameters.name: DestinationIp
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the data transfer.

parameters.name: BytesTransferred
parameters.description: The volume of bytes transferred for a specific event (if available per event, not aggregated).

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The aggregated number of transfer events within the timeframe.
